response.original_title: Los funerales de don Guillermo Billinghurst
response.overview: It includes: more than 25,000 people awaiting the arrival of the remains; the disembarkation of the remains brought from the Iquitos and their transfer to the mortuary chamber; the funeral procession in Callao; the arrival of the remains at the Church of La Merced and the Cathedral; the tribute from the President, ministers, diplomats, and workers' delegations; the coffin on the gun carriage heading to the cemetery; mourners and the official procession; workers' societies with students; the Chorrillos Military School and the closing of the parade by the Army.
response.title: Los funerales de don Guillermo Billinghurst
